LAW AND MOTION, 302, JUN-12-2024 RE: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B (COURTESY COPIES). JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: W. TRUPEK/R. WOODS; NOT REPORTED (302/RCE)

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC.'S (DBA LIME) MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE MATTER IS CONTESTED. ARGUMENT IS HELD. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC. DBA LIME'S (LIME) MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE PROCEEDINGS ARE STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: NGUYEN. (301/RCE)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Ann M. Kariuki, Esq. of Law Offices of Ann M. Kariuki, Tel. 510.520.0964, appearing for Plaintiff Bivett Brackett;
Stephanie Jones Nojima, Esq. of Sanders Robert LLP, Tel. 213.426.5000, appearing for Defendant Neutron Holdings, Inc. (DBA Lime).

Hearing re: DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC.'S (DBA LIME) Motion To Compel Arbitration.

The matter is contested. Argument is held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Neutron Holdings, Inc. dba Lime's (Lime) motion to compel arbitration is granted. The proceedings are stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration.

(See Word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.)

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Nguyen. (301/RCE)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-12-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC.'S (DBA LIME) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Off calendar for failure to comply with SF Local Rule 2.7B (courtesy copies).

Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: W. Trupek/R. Woods; Not Reported (302/RCE)
